live_outcomes.note: No live outcomes matured yet. Recommendations are tracked at 1/5/20/60/120/252 trading days; metrics appear here as horizons mature. The backtest below validates the signal methodology on history now.

confidence_calibration.method: Confidence is blended toward measured base rates: 5y point-in-time priors (by horizon, conviction tier, and market-regime side; signal_lab, embargoed) shrunk toward live recommendation outcomes with prior weight n=300. Matured short-window live outcomes count early at an explicit discount (see early_evidence). Risk-off regimes also raise the buy-action score bar and cut confidence (measured hit-rate drop when the S&P is below its 200-DMA).

early_evidence.note: Matured 5d live outcomes count toward the 20d bucket at 0.25x their sample size (a 5d window covers a quarter of the 20d horizon). 1d outcomes are excluded: single-day direction is noise-dominated (live: 45.7% hit with positive expectancy), so it would add noise, not evidence.

live_blend.note: No matured 20/60/120d (or discounted 5d) outcomes yet — priors dominate.

backtest.note: In-sample methodology validation over ~2y history; no look-ahead, 10bps round-trip cost, rebalance every 21 trading days, long when signal>=55. NOT a live tradeable track record.
